text.title: Project Documentation Convention Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this directory contain source code (not vendored, not empty stub)?

conclusion.verdict: skip; convention applies to source dirs only

branch.question: Does the directory have both CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md?

conclusion.verdict: scaffold pair; CLAUDE.md = `@AGENTS.md` only; AGENTS.md from template
trim or split: move detail to `.agents/`; AGENTS.md links + keeps essentials
verify required sections; otherwise add them

text.example: is_source=true → has_pair=false → scaffold; CLAUDE.md = `@AGENTS.md`; AGENTS.md from template + owner fills.
